productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Deep Tan Leather Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This leather belt from wrangler is set to pump up your style and add wonder to your attire.Length: 86 cm Made of leather for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to fit snug on the waist Brand logo embossed on the tail CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
